description: Manufactures mask blanks and photomasks for semiconductor chip manufacturing, glass disks for HDDs, and imaging products. Life Care segment includes eyeglasses, contact lenses, and medical endoscopes.

_externalRelationships.notes: 60%+ share in photomask blanks globally, 75%+ in EUV blanks. Only maker with both EUV and optical products. EUV blanks lock-in customers for full technology generations.

_metadata.notes: Founded 1941. Mask blanks business since 1974. IT segment higher margin than Life Care (60%+ of revenue). 52-week range: 14,345-28,000 JPY. 12 analysts rate Buy.
